title: Deliciously Nutty Ukrainian Chicken Dumplings
description: A creamy and nutty Ukrainian dish featuring sweet chilli sauce, air-fried to perfection, and gluten-free friendly, perfect for a monsoon evening.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the chicken breast, almond flour, sweet chilli sauce, sour cream, walnuts, onion, garlic, egg, salt, and black pepper, and mix well until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for about 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter, and flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
Preheat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Place the dumplings in a single layer in the air fryer basket, leaving some space between each dumpling.
Air-fry the dumplings for 5 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and cooked through.
Serve the dumplings hot with additional sweet chilli sauce for dipping.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or dill, if desired.
